postReview.title: England 1-2 Greece: Pavlidis ends Carsley's perfect start with stunning brace
postReview.description: Vangelis Pavlidis scored twice, including a dramatic stoppage-time winner, as Greece handed Lee Carsley his first defeat as England boss.
